# Meridian Roasters

> Meridian Roasters is a small-batch specialty coffee roaster offering traceable single-origin coffee, blends, and Swiss Water decaf roasted to order.

## Main pages
- Home: https://meridianroasters.com/
- Shop: https://meridianroasters.com/shop.html
- Our story: https://meridianroasters.com/about.html

## Key facts
- Coffee is roasted in small batches during the week it ships.
- Product pages state origin, processing method, altitude, roast level, and tasting notes.
- Current origins include Colombia, Ethiopia, Guatemala, Kenya, Rwanda, and Costa Rica.
